channel.title: Shandong Hongxinfa Refrigeration Equipment Co., Ltd. workshop and main products on Commercial Cooling Direct
channel.description: Recent content in Shandong Hongxinfa Refrigeration Equipment Co., Ltd. workshop and main products on Commercial Cooling Direct

item.title: Factory-Direct Manufacturing
item.description: From upright refrigerators to display showcases, we manufacture and export a complete range of commercial refrigeration equipment directly from our factory, ensuring stable quality, competitive pricing, and reliable supply.

item.title: Built for Hot Climate Markets
item.description: Our refrigeration systems are widely used across Africa, the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and Latin America. Designed to perform in high ambient temperatures, they deliver stable cooling where it matters most.

item.title: OEM & ODM Customization
item.description: Choose cabinet dimensions, colors, lighting, branding, shelving, door configurations, compressors, and cooling systems. We help distributors create products tailored to local market demand.

item.title: Premium Refrigeration Components
item.description: High-quality Donper and Embraco compressors, Low-E tempered glass, digital controllers, and durable refrigeration systems ensure long-term performance and reduced maintenance costs.

item.title: Strict Quality Control
item.description: Every unit undergoes comprehensive inspection before shipment. From refrigeration performance to electrical safety and appearance checks, we ensure consistent quality for every order.

item.title: Competitive Pricing & Fast Delivery
item.description: As a direct manufacturer, we control production costs and eliminate unnecessary middlemen. This allows our partners to offer reliable refrigeration equipment while maintaining healthy profit margins.

item.title: 4 Door Stainless Steel Refrigerators
item.description:
• Highly competitive pricing.
  • High efficiency compressor.
  • Customizable voltage and frequency.
  • Customizable inverter compressors.
  • Customizable branding and logo.

item.title: About Us
item.description:
Qingdao Lihongda International Trade Co., Ltd. is a professional supplier of commercial freezers based in Shandong, China. We have our own factory. We manufacture various types of commercial freezers, including display freezers, meat refrigeration freezers, stainless steel refrigeration freezers, and more. We accept any private customization, including voltage, frequency, and material customization. All our products have passed CE testing and possess IEC test reports and IS09001 certification.

All our products come with a one-year warranty.
